description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages named build and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that uses the gitlab/dind Docker image, runs the before_script commands `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_BUILD_TOKEN $CI_REGISTRY` and `export CONTAINER_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}}"`, then executes `docker build -t $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CONTAINER_TAG .` followed by `docker push $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CONTAINER_TAG`. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that uses the cdrx/rancher-gitlab-deploy image, runs the before_script `export CONTAINER_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_TAG:-${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}}"`, sets the environment name to Default with URL http://mleczko.waw.pl/, runs the script `upgrade --environment Default --stack load-balancer --service load-balancer --new-image $CI_REGISTRY/$CI_PROJECT_PATH:$CONTAINER_TAG`, and is configured to run only on tag pipelines.
